untranslatable_reason: Signal marked as CONTEXT_DEPENDENT with no clear directional bias. Success rates (52% bull, 53% bear) and multiple AUTHOR_SILENT parameters prevent deterministic rule translation. Pattern requires market context analysis beyond available indicators.
translation_notes: Black Candle defined as close < open (bearish candlestick body). Entry conditions implemented for both long and short directions due to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT classification. Exit triggered by reversal (close > open). Stop loss derived from source text example (0.66/21.05 ≈ 0.0314 ≈ 3.14%, rounded to 0.66 cents as specified). Hold period set conservatively to 5 days. Reward-to-risk ratio of 3:1 mentioned in source but not operationalized due to dynamic price targets.
